Picked up from your Da Nang hotel, you’ll not only see Hue’s Citadel and the royal tombs, but you’ll get to explore gems along the way, like Lang Co Beach and Hai Van Pass. With an English-speaking guide, your day is guaranteed to be worry-free and full of adventure.

Price varies by group size","img":"https://dynamic-media.tacdn.com/media/photo-o/2e/f5/ea/69/caption.jpg?w=800&h=600&s=1"},{"href":"/tours/Da-Nang/Son-Tra-Peninsula-3hr-Army-Jeep-Tour/d4680-117984P8","text":"Come on a fascinating 3-hour tour of the Son Tra peninsula from Danang city. Wind your way along the steep roads and hairpin bends of monkey mountain as you tackle one of Vietnam’s most hair-raising drives. Travelling in a restored U.S. army jeep, your driver and guide shows you the sites all while you sit and enjoy your open air jeep tour. Explore the lush greenery and diverse wildlife, including the red-shanked douc langurs ( monkey), of Son Tra mountain. Journey along the forgotten road to visit a former us army heliport. soaking up the dramatic coastal views. Ascend to the top of banco peak for a breathtaking 360 degree view of the highest point in Danang. And learn about how chessboard mountain got its name. Soak up the dramatic coastal views, before we pay a visit to the beautiful Linh Ung pagoda, home of Danang's famous lady buddha statue before heading back to your hotel. A truly memorable and breathtaking experience.

If it is canceled due to bad weather, you will be offered an alternative date or a full refund. Children can participate in a “Try Dive” from the age of 10. --- Single Dive: Enjoy 1 hour of diving + 1 hour of snorkeling Double Dive: After the first dive, the boat moves to another site for a second 1-hour dive --- Options for Certified Divers Typical dive depth: 10–25 meters ‍ Ratio: 1 instructor per 3–4 divers Options for Non-Certified Divers (Try dive) Typical dive depth: 3-6 meters ‍ Ratio: 1 instructor per 1–2 divers

Enjoy a convenient hotel pick-up and transfer to Cua Dai Harbor, where you'll board a speed boat for a scenic ride to the island. Once at Lang Beach, explore highlights such as the Marine Protected Area, Boat Shelter, Hai Tang Pagoda, and a traditional fishing village. Dive into crystal-clear waters for an exciting snorkeling experience. Relax at Bai Ong Ecological Zone or Bai Chong Beach, swimming and savoring a fresh seafood lunch. Return to Da Nang with cherished memories of your Cham Island adventure.

from $64","img":"https://dynamic-media.tacdn.com/media/photo-o/2e/fb/58/f0/caption.jpg?w=800&h=600&s=1"},{"href":"/tours/Da-Nang/Hue-Traditional-Craft-Villages-Tour-with-Guide/d4680-5601796P5","text":"This sunrise experience is designed for travelers who want to enjoy Da Nang’s most iconic sights in the most peaceful time of the day. Unlike regular daytime tours, you’ll visit Lady Buddha at sunrise, when the sky is soft, the air is cool, and the views over the coastline are absolutely magical. The early start also means you can explore Marble Mountains before the crowds arrive, giving you a more relaxed and authentic experience. The gentle morning light creates the best conditions for photography, perfect for couples, solo travelers, and content lovers looking for stunning shots without harsh sunlight. Another special touch is that the tour finishes early, so guests can still enjoy the rest of their day for beach time, Bana Hills, or other activities. Peaceful, crowd-free, cooler weather, and perfect sunrise photos — that’s what makes this tour truly special.

Take a traditional basket boat ride along the river in Bay Mau Coconut Forest, then try your hand at age-old fishing techniques. Next, head into Hoi An Ancient Town, and follow your guide past traditional wooden houses and colorful lanterns. Visit Phung Hung Old House, the Phuc Kien Assembly Hall and the Japanese Covered Bridge. At Hoi An Night Market, step inside tailor shops where you can have custom-made clothing created. Finish the day by dining on traditional Vietnamese specialties and local favorites.

We understand that make plan your trip and make your trip will be flexible and comfortable time and sightseeing. We provide airport transfers from Da Nang International Airport with drop-off and pick-up service only at hotels located in Hoi An Ancient Town, within 5 kilometers of the Night Market. For hotels and resorts situated outside this area, an additional surcharge will apply depending on the destination. A surcharge of 50,000 VND applies for Renaissance. For Intercontinental and Hoiana, the surcharge is 150,000 VND. Drop-off at Vinpearl or Tien Sa Port will incur a surcharge of 200,000 VND. For Bliss, the surcharge is 250,000 VND, and for Tui Blue, an additional 500,000 VND applies.

This tour is more than just tasting food—it’s a cultural journey through local neighborhoods where you’ll experience daily life, hear personal stories, enjoy the city like a true local. Explore hidden street vendors and local favorites as you sample a variety of savory specialties and traditional sweet treats. Dishes are shared depending on group size, allowing you to enjoy a wider range of flavors. Along the way, your guide may introduce highlights such as Dragon Bridge, Son Tra Marina, Son Tra Peninsula, Thuan Phuoc Bridge, depending on timing and pace. Food costs are not included, as street vendors do not provide invoices. Please inform us in advance of any dietary requirements, including vegetarian options.

Begin your adventure at Hai Van Xanh Glamping, where complimentary welcome drinks, refreshing mountain air, and lush green surroundings make for the perfect photo-worthy check-in spot. Relax in cozy wooden huts and open-air lounges designed for comfort and nature lovers alike. Continue to the legendary Hai Van Quan, a former military gateway rich in history and charm. From this mountaintop, admire sweeping views of Da Nang’s coastline, the winding pass, Lang Co Bay’s golden sands, and the mist-covered Truong Son mountains. With expert local guidance, skip-the-crowds access, and countless photo opportunities, this half-day retreat perfectly blends history, nature, and tranquility—ideal for couples, families, and friends seeking a memorable, easy-to-reach escape into Central Vietnam’s breathtaking highlands.
